required_contains.text: network token used across the whole network, while alpha tokens give ordinary subnets their own
The Root Subnet is the exception on the subnet side. Subnet Zero has no alpha currency, so root
staking stays TAO-denominated rather than adding a separate root alpha token

forbidden_contains.text: network token used across the whole network, while alpha tokens give each subnet its own token
- **Alpha tokens** — subnet-scoped assets local to each subnet.
